subject: An armored warrior in white-and-gold plate charges forward in a battle cry, flanked by a hooded figure and a green-armored companion in an urban battlefield setting
description: A humanoid warrior wearing white-and-gold plate armor with a crested helmet charges directly toward the viewer, mouth open in an aggressive shout. Their hair flows back from the helmet and a red-orange sash or cord hangs at the chest. Behind and to the left is a hooded figure in a blue cloak; behind and to the right is a companion in darker green-brown armor, fist raised. The background shows a hazy urban environment — columns or structures partially visible through pale atmospheric light. The three figures convey momentum and improvised unit cohesion.
foreground: White-and-gold armored warrior charging forward, mouth open, red cord at chest
background: Hazy urban ruins or columns, pale light
emotion: Fierce battle cry, forward momentum — the leading figure's face is a mask of aggression and determination
